work_unit: MM-H001: settle_buy_fill frozen_cash f64 drift floor clamp
situation: audit-2026-07-04-002 deep audit found MM-H001 (priority 1/22): account.rs L87-93 settle_buy_fill can drive frozen_cash negative via rounding drift in partial fill sequences. f64 subtraction residue (e.g. -1e-15) propagates to downstream reserve/release math, violating the invariant that frozen_cash >= 0. Derived fix from audit-cycle-state.derived_fixes[0].
action: Floor-clamp frozen_cash to 0.0 after subtracting previous_frozen in settle_buy_fill; emit tracing::warn when drift exceeds CASH_TOLERANCE so operators observe frequency. Added regression test settle_buy_fill_clamps_frozen_cash_drift_to_zero exercising drift of 1e-13. cargo test -p moni-engine --lib account:: passed 8/8 including new test.
outcome_evidence: cargo test -p moni-engine --lib account:: → 8 passed, 0 failed; new regression test passes; opt-worktree.sh pushed auto/opt-moni-master-1783105913 to origin; CR URL https://code.alibaba-inc.com/xtool/moni/codereview/new?from=master&to=auto/opt-moni-master-1783105913
next_suggestion: 派生下一优先级 pending finding MM-H002 (routes.rs REST endpoints lack auth, direction-shift, priority 2). 注意 MM-H002 是 direction-shift 需开新 worktree 加 auth middleware layer；若用户未批 MM-H001 merge，可先做 MM-H003 (route-fix, POST /trade-date date validation) 保持小单位节奏。
